hero.description: I build complex web systems, scalable backends, and intelligent automations that turn ideas into products clients can rely on.

about.label: About
about.headline: I don't build <accent>pages</accent>. I build <muted>systems</muted>.
about.bio1: With deep experience in backend architecture, event-driven systems, and full-stack development, I help businesses build software that actually scales — from the database layer to the UI.
about.bio2: Whether it's a microservices platform processing thousands of events, a custom e-commerce system, or an automation that saves 20 hours a week — I treat every project as an engineering problem worth solving properly.

services.label: What I do
services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Specialized in the intersection of clean architecture and pragmatic delivery.

web.subtitle: From concept to production
web.title: Web Applications
web.description: Full-stack web applications built with modern frameworks. Complex data flows, real-time features, authentication systems, and scalable architectures that grow with your business.

ecommerce.subtitle: Sell at scale
ecommerce.title: E-commerce Systems
ecommerce.description: Custom e-commerce platforms with payment processing, inventory management, order flows, and the performance required to handle traffic spikes without breaking.

automation.subtitle: Systems that talk to each other
automation.title: Automations & Integrations
automation.description: Connect your existing tools and automate repetitive workflows. From Kafka-driven microservices to simple API bridges — built to fit your stack, not replace it.

projects.label: Work
projects.title: Selected Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of systems, products, and experiments.

descriptions.keysolutions: Production corporate platform for a company selling banking & hospitality solutions — thermal paper, financial cards, POS accessories, and hotel systems. Live in production.
descriptions.hck-rental: Modern corporate site for an events company. Clean design, fast performance, deployed on Vercel.
descriptions.propertystake: Fractional property investment platform. Investors buy property shares and receive monthly passive income via event-driven microservices and scheduled jobs.
descriptions.advancedefrei: University feedback system with multilingual support (ES, EN, FR, JP), RBAC permissions, Excel processing via Python, and full Kubernetes orchestration.
descriptions.functional-graphs: Pure functional graph library in Scala/ZIO. DFS, BFS, Dijkstra, Floyd-Warshall, topological sort and cycle detection using tail recursion and pattern matching.
descriptions.mlproject: Multi-LLM news analyzer. Users bring their own OpenAI and Perplexity API keys for real-time news summarization and contextual insights.
descriptions.tetris: Complete Tetris clone with modular architecture. Tetromino logic, game loop, settings — all cleanly separated.

stack.label: Technology
stack.title: My Stack
stack.description: Tools and technologies I use to build production-ready software.

contact.label: Contact
contact.headline: Let's build <accent>something</accent> great together.
contact.description: I'm currently available for freelance projects and consulting. Whether you need a full product built or a complex system integrated — let's talk.

cv.label: Curriculum Vitae
cv.hint: Hover to tilt · Click to flip
cv.profile_text: Motivated software engineer specialized in Full Stack development and DevOps. Passionate about application design and optimization. Proficient in agile methodologies, process automation, and modern DevOps practices. Experience in collaborative and international environments.

disney.title: Full-Stack & DevOps Engineer
items: Development and agile management of custom applications for operational management in the Entertainment department.
React.js, Node.js, Java Spring Boot, Python, Docker, Gitlab, Jenkins.
Pipeline and business process automation: information extraction, image processing, PDF generation.

fresenius.title: Analytical Development

R&D project on aluminum leaching in medical containers.
Rigorous experimental protocols and statistical data analysis.

Projects: property investment app, audio AI recognition engine, document automation, video games.
